title: proofbundle verification-summary predicate v0.1
description: External/docs schema for the vendored verification-summary/v0.1 predicate (3.2.0 O4, EXPERIMENTAL). A signed, machine-readable summary of what was verified across the receipt chain: per level (eval/decision/outcome) the evidence class and verdict status, plus an explicit non-claims block. The enforced validator is src/proofbundle/verification_summary.py (hand-rolled, fail-closed). No-Overclaim: a summary states which checks passed, never that the underlying claim is true, safe or complete. lowerCamelCase (ITE-9).

receiptRef.description: content root of the verified receipt statement; MANDATORY when status=VERIFIED (verify-time levels_consistent check), MAY be omitted for a NOT_EVALUATED level

chainRef.description: optional content root of the outermost (outcome) receipt tying the chain together
